case_title: CHETAL, SHYAM vs. AROSA HOTELS, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHETAL, SHYAM AS TO DEFENDANT AROSA HOTELS, INC.
